title: 2. Bloodletting at WuLing 五岭 (DT.04) on the back 背部五岭穴点刺亦佳
text:
Extremely good effect can be achieved by pricking the blue vein at DaBai. Bloodletting at WuLing is also
effective. Good effect can also be achieved by performing bloodletting at ShaoShang, ZhongShang and LaoShang or
at the ear tip. Points from the fourteen regular meridians include DaZhui and QuChi, which can be used alone or
in combination, with the former more effective than the latter.
